issues.description: Effect is missing the lookup/reveal mechanism. DSL should specify: look at top 3 cards, reveal up to 1 Navy type card (excluding Brannew), add to hand, trash the rest. Current DSL uses generic SearchDeck without proper filtering or trash action.
Filter is 'Any' but should restrict to Navy type cards excluding Brannew by name. Missing type and exclusion constraints.
Missing trash action for remaining cards. Effect requires two outcomes: add revealed card to hand AND trash the rest.
